title: HTTP Upstream Server
description: NginxHTTPUpstreamPeer schema from NGINX Plus REST API

service.description: The service parameter value of the server directive.

name.description: The name of the server specified in the server directive.

backup.description: A boolean value indicating whether the server is a backup server.

state.description: Current state, which may be one of “up”, “draining”, “down”, “unavail”, “checking”, and “unhealthy”.

active.description: The current number of active connections.

handshakes.description: The total number of successful SSL handshakes.

handshakes_failed.description: The total number of failed SSL handshakes.

session_reuses.description: The total number of session reuses during SSL handshake.

no_common_protocol.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of no common protocol.

handshake_timeout.description: The number of SSL handshakes failed because of a timeout.

peer_rejected_cert.description: The number of failed SSL handshakes when nginx presented the certificate to the upstream server but it was rejected with a corresponding alert message.

expired_cert.description: An expired or not yet valid certificate was presented by an upstream server.

revoked_cert.description: A revoked certificate was presented by an upstream server.

hostname_mismatch.description: Server's certificate doesn't match the hostname.

requests.description: The total number of client requests forwarded to this server.

1xx.description: The number of responses with “1xx” status codes.

2xx.description: The number of responses with “2xx” status codes.

3xx.description: The number of responses with “3xx” status codes.

4xx.description: The number of responses with “4xx” status codes.

5xx.description: The number of responses with “5xx” status codes.

codes.description: The number of responses per each status code.

codeNumber.description: The number of responses with this particular status code.

total.description: The total number of responses obtained from this server.

sent.description: The total number of bytes sent to this server.

received.description: The total number of bytes received from this server.

fails.description: The total number of unsuccessful attempts to communicate with the server.

unavail.description: How many times the server became unavailable for client requests (state “unavail”) due to the number of unsuccessful attempts reaching the max_fails threshold.

checks.description: The total number of health check requests made.

fails.description: The number of failed health checks.

unhealthy.description: How many times the server became unhealthy (state “unhealthy”).

last_passed.description: Boolean indicating if the last health check request was successful and passed tests.

downtime.description: Total time the server was in the “unavail”, “checking”, and “unhealthy” states.

downstart.description: The time when the server became “unavail”, “checking”, or “unhealthy”, in the ISO 8601 format with millisecond resolution.

selected.description: The time when the server was last selected to process a request, in the ISO 8601 format with millisecond resolution.

header_time.description: The average time to get the response header from the server.

response_time.description: The average time to get the full response from the server.
